name: Fire Infinity
description: An internal Infinity-platform test weapon built around fixed incendiary damage and the same endless-fire gimmick as the cut Fire Drill.

special.description: It is always incendiary, never consumes ammo, and fires in a fixed pattern that ignores normal recoil. It also has guaranteed elemental application, higher damage, and better aimed accuracy in exchange for a lower fire rate.
special.title: Testing Fire Resistance

notes: It uses the same model as the Infinity and appears to be an internal Fire Drill test version, using the balance entry `GD_Anemone_Weapons.Testing_Resist_100.100_Fire` instead of `GD_Anemone_Weapons.A_Resist_100.100_Fire`.
